parameterProviderTypes.description: Provides parameters from HashiCorp Vault Key/Value Version 1 and Version 2 Secrets.  Each Secret represents a parameter group, which will map to a Parameter Context.  The keys and values in the Secret map to Parameters.

explicitRestrictions.explanation: Provides operator the ability to read environment variables, which may contain environment credentials.

parameterProviderTypes.description: Fetches parameters from GCP Secret Manager.  Each secret becomes a Parameter, which can be mapped to a Parameter Group by adding a GCP label named 'group-name'.
